name: pr-to-video
description: pr-to-video workflow - a GitHub pull request (URL like github.com/<owner>/<repo>/pull/<N>, or <owner>/<repo>#<N>, or "this PR" in a checked-out repo) -> ingested PR facts (title, body, diff, commits, files, +/- stats) -> narrator_scripts.json + audio (voice + BGM) + section_plan.md -> code-diff / before-after / impact explainer video. Input is a CODE CHANGE. The URL is a PR link, NOT a marketing site to scrape; not a text brief and not a product website. For a non-PR input (product site, general
author: heygen-com
